const CONFIG = getPortalConfig_(); function doGet(e) { try { const mode = param_(e, "mode"); const token = param_(e, "t"); const projectId = param_(e, "p"); const email = param_(e, "email"); const zip = digitsOnly_(param_(e, "zip")); let result; switch (mode) { case "lookup": result = buildPortalLookupResponse_(email, zip); break; case "logout": result = buildPortalLogoutResponse_(token); break; default: result = projectId ? buildProjectReportResponse_(token, projectId) : buildPortalListResponse_(token); break; } return jsonResponse_(result); } catch (error) { return jsonResponse_({ success: false, code: "SERVER_ERROR", message: error && error.message ? error.message : "Unexpected server error." }); } } function doPost(e) { try { if (!e || !e.parameter) { throw new Error("No form data was received."); } const mode = String(e.parameter.mode || "").trim(); switch (mode) { case "create_service_request": return jsonResponse_(buildCreateServiceRequestResponse_(e)); default: return jsonResponse_({ success: false, code: "INVALID_MODE", message: "Unsupported POST mode." }); } } catch (error) { return jsonResponse_({ success: false, code: "SERVER_ERROR", message: error && error.message ? error.message : "Unexpected server error." }); } } function buildCreateServiceRequestResponse_(e) { const p = e.parameter || {}; const token = String(p.t || "").trim(); const context = getPortalContext_(token); if (!context.success) { return context; } if (!context.client) { return { success: false, code: "CLIENT_NOT_FOUND", message: "Unable to resolve the logged-in client." }; } const client = context.client; const serviceType = srRequireEnum_( p.ServiceType, [ "General Repair", "Property Maintenance", "Installations", "Interior Improvements", "Rental Turnover Work", "Custom Request" ], "Service type is required." ); const urgency = srRequireEnum_( p.Urgency, ["Routine", "Soon", "Urgent"], "Urgency is required." ); const propertyOccupied = srRequireEnum_( p.PropertyOccupied, ["Yes", "No", "Unknown"], "Property occupied is required." ); const permissionToEnter = srRequireEnum_( p.PermissionToEnter, ["Yes", "No", "Call First"], "Permission to enter is required." ); const bestContactTime = srRequireEnum_( p.BestContactTime, ["8 AM - 12 PM", "12 PM - 4 PM", "4 PM - 8 PM", "Anytime"], "Best contact time is required." ); const issueDescription = srRequireText_( p.IssueDescription, "Issue description is required." ); const onSiteContactName = srRequireText_( p.OnSiteContactName, "On-site contact name is required." ); const onSiteContactPhone = srCleanPhone_(p.OnSiteContactPhone, true); const serviceStreet1 = srRequireText_( p.ServiceStreet1, "Service street address is required." ); const serviceStreet2 = String(p.ServiceStreet2 || "").trim(); const serviceCity = srRequireText_(p.ServiceCity, "Service city is required."); const serviceState = srCleanState_(p.ServiceState, true); const serviceZip = srCleanZip_(p.ServiceZip, true); const serviceAddressInput = String(p.ServiceAddress || "").trim(); const serviceAddress = serviceAddressInput || srBuildAddress_( serviceStreet1, serviceStreet2, serviceCity, serviceState, serviceZip ); const requesterName = srRequireText_( client.ContactName || client.ClientName, "Requester name could not be resolved from portal client." ); const requesterEmail = srCleanEmail_(client.Email, true); const requesterPhone = srCleanPhone_(client.Phone, false); const requesterStreet1 = srRequireText_( client.Street1, "Requester street address could not be resolved from portal client." ); const requesterStreet2 = String(client.Street2 || "").trim(); const requesterCity = srRequireText_( client.City, "Requester city could not be resolved from portal client." ); const requesterState = srCleanState_(client.State, true); const requesterZip = srCleanZip_(client.Zip, true); const requesterAddress = srBuildAddress_( requesterStreet1, requesterStreet2, requesterCity, requesterState, requesterZip ); const billingStreet1 = requesterStreet1; const billingStreet2 = requesterStreet2; const billingCity = requesterCity; const billingState = requesterState; const billingZip = requesterZip; const billingAddress = requesterAddress; const row = { RequesterName: requesterName, RequesterEmail: requesterEmail, RequesterPhone: requesterPhone, RequesterAddress: requesterAddress, RequesterStreet1: requesterStreet1, RequesterStreet2: requesterStreet2, RequesterCity: requesterCity, RequesterState: requesterState, RequesterZip: requesterZip, ServiceType: serviceType, IssueDescription: issueDescription, Urgency: urgency, ServiceAddress: serviceAddress, ServiceStreet1: serviceStreet1, ServiceStreet2: serviceStreet2, ServiceCity: serviceCity, ServiceState: serviceState, ServiceZip: serviceZip, PropertyOccupied: propertyOccupied, PermissionToEnter: permissionToEnter, OnSiteContactName: onSiteContactName, OnSiteContactPhone: onSiteContactPhone, BestContactTime: bestContactTime, BillingAddress: billingAddress, BillingStreet1: billingStreet1, BillingStreet2: billingStreet2, BillingCity: billingCity, BillingState: billingState, BillingZip: billingZip, PayingClientID: "", PropertyClientID: "", ProjectID: "", RelatedProjectID: "" }; const apiResult = addServiceRequestViaAppSheet_(row); return { success: true, code: "SERVICE_REQUEST_CREATED", message: "Your service request was submitted successfully.", result: apiResult }; } function addServiceRequestViaAppSheet_(row) { const cfg = getAppSheetConfig_(); const url = "https://" + cfg.region + "/api/v2/apps/" + encodeURIComponent(cfg.appId) + "/tables/ServiceRequests/Action"; const payload = { Action: "Add", Properties: { Locale: "en-US", Timezone: "America/Chicago" }, Rows: [row] }; const response = UrlFetchApp.fetch(url, { method: "post", contentType: "application/json", headers: { ApplicationAccessKey: cfg.applicationAccessKey }, payload: JSON.stringify(payload), muteHttpExceptions: true }); const code = response.getResponseCode(); const body = response.getContentText(); let parsed = null; try { parsed = JSON.parse(body); } catch (err) { parsed = null; } if (code < 200 || code >= 300) { throw new Error("AppSheet API failed with HTTP " + code + ": " + body); } return parsed || { raw: body }; } function getAppSheetConfig_() { const props = PropertiesService.getScriptProperties(); const appId = String(props.getProperty("APPSHEET_APP_ID") || "").trim(); const applicationAccessKey = String(props.getProperty("APPSHEET_APP_ACCESS_KEY") || "").trim(); const region = String(props.getProperty("APPSHEET_REGION") || "www.appsheet.com").trim(); if (!appId) { throw new Error("Missing script property: APPSHEET_APP_ID"); } if (!applicationAccessKey) { throw new Error("Missing script property: APPSHEET_APP_ACCESS_KEY"); } return { appId: appId, applicationAccessKey: applicationAccessKey, region: region }; } function srRequireText_(value, message) { const text = String(value || "").trim(); if (!text) { throw new Error(message); } return text; } function srRequireEnum_(value, allowedValues, message) { const normalized = String(value || "").trim(); if (!normalized || allowedValues.indexOf(normalized) === -1) { throw new Error(message); } return normalized; } function srCleanPhone_(value, required) { const raw = String(value || "").trim(); let digits = raw.replace(/\D/g, ""); if (!digits) { if (required) { throw new Error("A required phone number is missing."); } return ""; } if (digits.length === 11 && digits.startsWith("1")) { digits = digits.substring(1); } if (digits.length !== 10) { throw new Error("Phone numbers must be 10 digits, or 11 digits starting with 1."); } return digits; } function srCleanZip_(value, required) { const digits = String(value || "").trim().replace(/\D/g, ""); if (!digits) { if (required) { throw new Error("A required ZIP code is missing."); } return ""; } if (digits.length !== 5) { throw new Error("ZIP codes must be 5 digits."); } return digits; } function srCleanState_(value, required) { const state = String(value || "") .trim() .replace(/[^A-Za-z]/g, "") .toUpperCase(); if (!state) { if (required) { throw new Error("A required state code is missing."); } return ""; } if (state.length !== 2) { throw new Error("State codes must be 2 letters."); } return state; } function srCleanEmail_(value, required) { const email = String(value || "").trim(); if (!email) { if (required) { throw new Error("A required email address is missing."); } return ""; } const basicEmailPattern = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/; if (!basicEmailPattern.test(email)) { throw new Error("Email address is not valid."); } return email; } function srBuildAddress_(street1, street2, city, state, zip) { const line1 = String(street1 || "").trim(); const line2 = String(street2 || "").trim(); const cityVal = String(city || "").trim(); const stateVal = String(state || "").trim(); const zipVal = String(zip || "").trim(); const streetPart = [line1, line2].filter(Boolean).join(", "); const cityStateZipPart = [cityVal, stateVal, zipVal].filter(Boolean).join(", "); return [streetPart, cityStateZipPart].filter(Boolean).join(", "); } function buildPortalLookupResponse_(email, zip) { const neutralMessage = "If we found a matching project account, we sent a secure access link to your email."; if (!email) { return { success: false, code: "MISSING_EMAIL", message: "Email is required." }; } if (zip.length !== 5) { return { success: false, code: "INVALID_ZIP", message: "A valid 5-digit ZIP code is required." }; } const ss = openPortalSpreadsheet_(); const clientSheet = getRequiredSheet_(ss, "Clients"); const portalGroupSheet = getRequiredSheet_(ss, "PortalGroups"); const clientRows = getSheetObjects_(clientSheet); const portalGroupRows = getSheetObjects_(portalGroupSheet); assertRequiredColumns_( clientRows.headers, [ "ClientID", "ClientName", "ContactName", "Email", "Street1", "Street2", "City", "State", "Zip", "IsActive", "PortalGroupID" ], "client" ); assertRequiredColumns_( portalGroupRows.headers, [ "PortalGroupID", "ClientID", "GroupName", "IsActive", "Token", "Notes", "TokenIssuedDateTime", "TokenExpiresDateTime", "LastAccessDateTime" ], "portal group" ); const normalizedEmail = String(email || "").trim().toLowerCase(); const matches = clientRows.items .map(function(row, index) { return { rowIndex: index, rowNumber: index + 2, clientId: String(row.ClientID || "").trim(), clientName: String(row.ClientName || "").trim(), contactName: String(row.ContactName || "").trim(), email: String(row.Email || "").trim().toLowerCase(), zip: digitsOnly_(row.Zip), isActive: toBoolean_(row.IsActive), portalGroupId: String(row.PortalGroupID || "").trim(), address: buildClientAddress_(row) }; }) .filter(function(client) { return client.email === normalizedEmail && client.zip === zip && client.isActive; }) .sort(function(a, b) { return String(a.clientName || "").localeCompare(String(b.clientName || "")); }); if (!matches.length) { return { success: true, code: "LOOKUP_ACCEPTED", message: neutralMessage }; } const validation = validateMatchedClientsForPortal_(matches, portalGroupRows.items); if (!validation.valid) { return { success: true, code: "LOOKUP_ACCEPTED", message: neutralMessage }; } const portalGroup = issueOrReusePortalGroupToken_( portalGroupSheet, portalGroupRows.headers, validation.portalGroup ); sendPortalAccessEmail_(email, portalGroup); return { success: true, code: "LOOKUP_ACCEPTED", message: neutralMessage }; } function validateMatchedClientsForPortal_(matches, portalGroupItems) { if (!matches || !matches.length) { return { valid: false }; } const hasBlankPortalGroupId = matches.some(function(match) { return !String(match.portalGroupId || "").trim(); }); if (hasBlankPortalGroupId) { return { valid: false }; } const distinctPortalGroupIds = uniqueValues_( matches.map(function(match) { return String(match.portalGroupId || "").trim(); }).filter(Boolean) ); if (distinctPortalGroupIds.length !== 1) { return { valid: false }; } const portalGroupId = distinctPortalGroupIds[0]; const portalGroupRowIndex = portalGroupItems.findIndex(function(row) { return String(row.PortalGroupID || "").trim() === portalGroupId; }); if (portalGroupRowIndex === -1) { return { valid: false }; } const portalGroup = portalGroupItems[portalGroupRowIndex]; if (!toBoolean_(portalGroup.IsActive)) { return { valid: false }; } const anchorClientId = String(portalGroup.ClientID || "").trim(); if (!anchorClientId) { return { valid: false }; } return { valid: true, portalGroup: { rowIndex: portalGroupRowIndex, rowNumber: portalGroupRowIndex + 2, portalGroupId: String(portalGroup.PortalGroupID || "").trim(), clientId: anchorClientId, groupName: String(portalGroup.GroupName || "").trim(), isActive: toBoolean_(portalGroup.IsActive), token: String(portalGroup.Token || "").trim(), tokenIssuedDateTime: portalGroup.TokenIssuedDateTime, tokenExpiresDateTime: portalGroup.TokenExpiresDateTime, lastAccessDateTime: portalGroup.LastAccessDateTime, notes: portalGroup.Notes } }; } function issueOrReusePortalGroupToken_(portalGroupSheet, headers, portalGroup) { const tokenCol = columnNumber_(headers, "Token"); const issuedCol = columnNumber_(headers, "TokenIssuedDateTime"); const expiresCol = columnNumber_(headers, "TokenExpiresDateTime"); const existingToken = String(portalGroup.token || "").trim(); const existingExpiry = toDate_(portalGroup.tokenExpiresDateTime); if (existingToken && existingExpiry && existingExpiry.getTime() > new Date().getTime()) { return { portalGroupId: portalGroup.portalGroupId, clientId: portalGroup.clientId, groupName: portalGroup.groupName, token: existingToken, tokenIssuedDateTime: portalGroup.tokenIssuedDateTime, tokenExpiresDateTime: portalGroup.tokenExpiresDateTime }; } const issuedAt = new Date(); const expiresAt = new Date(issuedAt.getTime() + CONFIG.portalTokenLifetimeHours * 60 * 60 * 1000); const newToken = generatePortalToken_(); setCellValueIfChanged_(portalGroupSheet, portalGroup.rowNumber, tokenCol, newToken); setCellValueIfChanged_(portalGroupSheet, portalGroup.rowNumber, issuedCol, issuedAt); setCellValueIfChanged_(portalGroupSheet, portalGroup.rowNumber, expiresCol, expiresAt); return { portalGroupId: portalGroup.portalGroupId, clientId: portalGroup.clientId, groupName: portalGroup.groupName, token: newToken, tokenIssuedDateTime: issuedAt, tokenExpiresDateTime: expiresAt }; } function buildPortalLogoutResponse_(token) { if (!token) { return { success: false, code: "MISSING_TOKEN", message: "Access token is required." }; } const ss = openPortalSpreadsheet_(); const portalGroupSheet = getRequiredSheet_(ss, "PortalGroups"); const portalGroupRows = getSheetObjects_(portalGroupSheet); assertRequiredColumns_( portalGroupRows.headers, [ "PortalGroupID", "ClientID", "GroupName", "IsActive", "Token", "Notes", "TokenIssuedDateTime", "TokenExpiresDateTime", "LastAccessDateTime" ], "portal group" ); const rowIndex = portalGroupRows.items.findIndex(function(row) { return String(row.Token || "").trim() === String(token || "").trim(); }); if (rowIndex === -1) { return { success: true, code: "LOGOUT_COMPLETE", message: "You have been signed out." }; } const rowNumber = rowIndex + 2; setCellValueIfChanged_(portalGroupSheet, rowNumber, columnNumber_(portalGroupRows.headers, "Token"), ""); setCellValueIfChanged_(portalGroupSheet, rowNumber, columnNumber_(portalGroupRows.headers, "TokenIssuedDateTime"), ""); setCellValueIfChanged_(portalGroupSheet, rowNumber, columnNumber_(portalGroupRows.headers, "TokenExpiresDateTime"), ""); return { success: true, code: "LOGOUT_COMPLETE", message: "You have been signed out." }; } function generatePortalToken_() { const bytes = Utilities.getUuid().replace(/-/g, "") + Utilities.getUuid().replace(/-/g, ""); return bytes.slice(0, 48); } function sendPortalAccessEmail_(email, portalGroup) { const safeEmail = String(email || "").trim(); if (!safeEmail || !portalGroup || !portalGroup.token) return; const subject = "Your Ketter Home Improvements project access link"; const lines = []; lines.push("Ketter Home Improvements"); lines.push(""); lines.push("Use the secure link below to access your Project Center:"); lines.push(""); lines.push(toAbsolutePortalUrl_(buildPortalUrl_(portalGroup.token))); lines.push(""); lines.push("This link expires in " + CONFIG.portalTokenLifetimeHours + " hours."); lines.push(""); lines.push("If you did not request this email, you can ignore it."); MailApp.sendEmail({ to: safeEmail, subject: subject, body: lines.join("\n") }); } function buildPortalListResponse_(token) { const context = getPortalContext_(token); if (!context.success) return context; return { success: true, code: "ACCESS_GRANTED", message: "Project Center access active.", client: context.client ? { clientId: context.client.ClientID, clientName: context.client.ClientName, contactName: context.client.ContactName } : null, portalGroup: { portalGroupId: context.portalGroup.PortalGroupID, groupName: context.portalGroup.GroupName }, portal: { status: "Active", tokenIssuedDateTime: normalizeDateOutput_(context.portalGroup.TokenIssuedDateTime), tokenExpiresDateTime: normalizeDateOutput_(context.portalGroup.TokenExpiresDateTime), lastAccessDateTime: normalizeDateOutput_(context.now) }, data: { reports: [], projects: context.projects.map(function(project) { return { projectId: project.projectId, projectName: project.projectName, status: project.status, lastActivityOn: project.lastActivityOn }; }) } }; } function buildProjectReportResponse_(token, projectId) { const context = getPortalContext_(token); if (!context.success) return context; const project = context.projects.find(function(item) { return String(item.projectId || "").trim() === String(projectId || "").trim(); }); if (!project) { return { success: false, code: "PROJECT_NOT_FOUND", message: "The selected project is not available in your Project Center." }; } const ss = openPortalSpreadsheet_(); const client = getPortalClientForProject_(ss, project); const collections = getPortalCollectionsForProject_(ss, project.projectId); return { success: true, code: "ACCESS_GRANTED", portalGroup: { portalGroupId: context.portalGroup.PortalGroupID, groupName: context.portalGroup.GroupName }, client: client, project: project, collections: collections }; } function getPortalContext_(token) { if (!token) { return { success: false, code: "MISSING_TOKEN", message: "Access token is required." }; } const ss = openPortalSpreadsheet_(); const portalGroupSheet = getRequiredSheet_(ss, "PortalGroups"); const portalGroupRows = getSheetObjects_(portalGroupSheet); assertRequiredColumns_( portalGroupRows.headers, [ "PortalGroupID", "ClientID", "GroupName", "IsActive", "Token", "Notes", "TokenIssuedDateTime", "TokenExpiresDateTime", "LastAccessDateTime" ], "portal group" ); const portalGroupRowIndex = portalGroupRows.items.findIndex(function(row) { return String(row.Token || "").trim() === String(token || "").trim(); }); if (portalGroupRowIndex === -1) { return { success: false, code: "INVALID_TOKEN", message: "Access link is invalid." }; } const portalGroup = portalGroupRows.items[portalGroupRowIndex]; const sheetRowNumber = portalGroupRowIndex + 2; if (!toBoolean_(portalGroup.IsActive)) { return { success: false, code: "PORTAL_DISABLED", message: "Project Center access is not enabled." }; } if (isExpired_(portalGroup.TokenExpiresDateTime)) { clearPortalGroupToken_(portalGroupSheet, portalGroupRows.headers, sheetRowNumber); return { success: false, code: "PORTAL_EXPIRED", message: "This access link has expired." }; } const now = new Date(); setCellValueIfChanged_(portalGroupSheet, sheetRowNumber, columnNumber_(portalGroupRows.headers, "LastAccessDateTime"), now); const anchorClientId = String(portalGroup.ClientID || "").trim(); const client = anchorClientId ? getClientById_(ss, anchorClientId) : null; return { success: true, portalGroup: portalGroup, client: client, projects: getPortalProjects_(ss, anchorClientId), now: now }; } function clearPortalGroupToken_(portalGroupSheet, headers, rowNumber) { setCellValueIfChanged_(portalGroupSheet, rowNumber, columnNumber_(headers, "Token"), ""); setCellValueIfChanged_(portalGroupSheet, rowNumber, columnNumber_(headers, "TokenIssuedDateTime"), ""); setCellValueIfChanged_(portalGroupSheet, rowNumber, columnNumber_(headers, "TokenExpiresDateTime"), ""); } function getClientById_(ss, clientId) { const clientSheet = getRequiredSheet_(ss, "Clients"); const clientRows = getSheetObjects_(clientSheet); assertRequiredColumns_( clientRows.headers, [ "ClientID", "ClientName", "ContactName", "Email", "Phone", "Street1", "Street2", "City", "State", "Zip", "Notes" ], "client" ); const client = clientRows.items.find(function(row) { return String(row.ClientID || "").trim() === String(clientId || "").trim(); }); return client || null; } function getPortalProjects_(ss, clientId) { const projectSheet = getRequiredSheet_(ss, "Projects"); const projectRows = getSheetObjects_(projectSheet); assertRequiredColumns_( projectRows.headers, [ "ProjectID", "ProjectName", "PayingClientID", "PropertyClientID", "Street1", "Street2", "City", "State", "Zip", "Status", "StartDate", "EndDate", "Description", "Update", "Notes", "IsActive", "PortalVisible", "LastActivityOn" ], "project" ); const now = new Date(); const minDate = new Date(now); minDate.setDate(minDate.getDate() - CONFIG.portalProjectsPastDays); const maxDate = new Date(now); maxDate.setDate(maxDate.getDate() + CONFIG.portalProjectsFutureDays); return projectRows.items .filter(function(row) { if (String(row.PayingClientID || "").trim() !== String(clientId || "").trim()) return false; if (!toBoolean_(row.IsActive)) return false; if (!toBoolean_(row.PortalVisible)) return false; const activityDate = toDate_(row.LastActivityOn) || toDate_(row.EndDate) || toDate_(row.StartDate); if (!activityDate) return true; return activityDate >= minDate && activityDate <= maxDate; }) .map(function(row) { return { ProjectID: row.ProjectID, ProjectName: row.ProjectName, PayingClientID: row.PayingClientID, PropertyClientID: row.PropertyClientID, Street1: row.Street1, Street2: row.Street2, City: row.City, State: row.State, Zip: row.Zip, Status: row.Status, StartDate: normalizeDateOutput_(row.StartDate), EndDate: normalizeDateOutput_(row.EndDate), LastActivityOn: normalizeDateOutput_(row.LastActivityOn), Description: row.Description, Update: row.Update, IsActive: row.IsActive, PortalVisible: row.PortalVisible, projectId: row.ProjectID, projectName: row.ProjectName, payingClientId: row.PayingClientID, propertyClientId: row.PropertyClientID, street1: row.Street1, street2: row.Street2, city: row.City, state: row.State, zip: row.Zip, status: row.Status, startDate: normalizeDateOutput_(row.StartDate), endDate: normalizeDateOutput_(row.EndDate), lastActivityOn: normalizeDateOutput_(row.LastActivityOn), description: row.Description, update: row.Update, isActive: row.IsActive, portalVisible: row.PortalVisible }; }) .sort(function(a, b) { return String(a.projectName || "").localeCompare(String(b.projectName || "")); }); } function getPortalClientForProject_(ss, project) { const clientSheet = getRequiredSheet_(ss, "Clients"); const clientRows = getSheetObjects_(clientSheet); assertRequiredColumns_( clientRows.headers, [ "ClientID", "ClientName", "ContactName", "Email", "Phone", "Street1", "Street2", "City", "State", "Zip", "Notes" ], "client" ); const client = clientRows.items.find(function(row) { return String(row.ClientID || "").trim() === String(project.payingClientId || "").trim(); }); if (!client) return null; return { ClientID: client.ClientID, ClientName: client.ClientName, ContactName: client.ContactName, Email: client.Email, Phone: client.Phone, Street1: client.Street1, Street2: client.Street2, City: client.City, State: client.State, Zip: client.Zip, clientId: client.ClientID, clientName: client.ClientName, contactName: client.ContactName, email: client.Email, phone: client.Phone, street1: client.Street1, street2: client.Street2, city: client.City, state: client.State, zip: client.Zip }; } function getPortalCollectionsForProject_(ss, projectId) { const vendors = getVendorLookup_(ss); return { documents: getPortalDocuments_(ss, projectId), timeEntries: getPortalTimeEntries_(ss, projectId), expenses: getPortalExpenses_(ss, projectId, vendors), refunds: getPortalRefunds_(ss, projectId, vendors), payments: getPortalPayments_(ss, projectId), expenseAllocations: getPortalExpenseAllocations_(ss, projectId), serviceRequests: getPortalServiceRequests_(ss, projectId) }; } function getVendorLookup_(ss) { const sheet = getRequiredSheet_(ss, "Vendors"); const rows = getSheetObjects_(sheet); assertRequiredColumns_( rows.headers, [ "VendorID", "VendorName", "Notes", "IsActive" ], "vendor" ); const lookup = {}; rows.items.forEach(function(row) { const vendorId = String(row.VendorID || "").trim(); if (!vendorId) return; lookup[vendorId] = { VendorID: row.VendorID, VendorName: row.VendorName, IsActive: row.IsActive, vendorId: row.VendorID, vendorName: row.VendorName, isActive: row.IsActive }; }); return lookup; } function getPortalDocuments_(ss, projectId) { const sheet = getRequiredSheet_(ss, "Documents"); const rows = getSheetObjects_(sheet); assertRequiredColumns_( rows.headers, [ "DocumentID", "ProjectID", "DisplayName", "DocumentType", "FileURL", "Description", "Notes", "PortalVisible", "CreatedDateTime", "CreatedBy", "ParentType", "ParentKey", "DocumentStatus" ], "document" ); return rows.items .filter(function(row) { return String(row.ProjectID || "").trim() === String(projectId || "").trim() && toBoolean_(row.PortalVisible); }) .map(function(row) { return { DocumentID: row.DocumentID, ProjectID: row.ProjectID, DisplayName: row.DisplayName, DocumentType: row.DocumentType, FileURL: row.FileURL, Description: row.Description, PortalVisible: row.PortalVisible, CreatedDateTime: normalizeDateOutput_(row.CreatedDateTime), CreatedBy: row.CreatedBy, ParentType: row.ParentType, ParentKey: row.ParentKey, DocumentStatus: row.DocumentStatus, documentId: row.DocumentID, projectId: row.ProjectID, displayName: row.DisplayName, documentType: row.DocumentType, fileUrl: row.FileURL, description: row.Description, portalVisible: row.PortalVisible, createdDateTime: normalizeDateOutput_(row.CreatedDateTime), createdBy: row.CreatedBy, parentType: row.ParentType, parentKey: row.ParentKey, documentStatus: row.DocumentStatus }; }); } function getPortalTimeEntries_(ss, projectId) { const sheet = getRequiredSheet_(ss, "TimeEntries"); const rows = getSheetObjects_(sheet); assertRequiredColumns_( rows.headers, [ "TimeID", "TimeDate", "ProjectID", "WorkerName", "HoursWorked", "Description", "Notes", "Billable", "HourlyRate", "CreatedDate", "CreatedBy" ], "time entry" ); return rows.items .filter(function(row) { return String(row.ProjectID || "").trim() === String(projectId || "").trim(); }) .map(function(row) { return { TimeID: row.TimeID, TimeDate: normalizeDateOutput_(row.TimeDate), ProjectID: row.ProjectID, WorkerName: row.WorkerName, HoursWorked: row.HoursWorked, Description: row.Description, Billable: row.Billable, HourlyRate: row.HourlyRate, CreatedDate: normalizeDateOutput_(row.CreatedDate), CreatedBy: row.CreatedBy, timeId: row.TimeID, timeDate: normalizeDateOutput_(row.TimeDate), projectId: row.ProjectID, workerName: row.WorkerName, hoursWorked: row.HoursWorked, description: row.Description, billable: row.Billable, hourlyRate: row.HourlyRate, createdDate: normalizeDateOutput_(row.CreatedDate), createdBy: row.CreatedBy }; }); } function getPortalExpenses_(ss, projectId, vendorLookup) { const sheet = getRequiredSheet_(ss, "Expenses"); const rows = getSheetObjects_(sheet); assertRequiredColumns_( rows.headers, [ "ExpenseID", "ExpenseDate", "VendorID", "TotalAmount", "PaymentAccountID", "Description", "Notes", "CreatedDate", "CreatedBy", "ProjectID", "InitialAllocationAmount" ], "expense" ); return rows.items .filter(function(row) { return String(row.ProjectID || "").trim() === String(projectId || "").trim(); }) .map(function(row) { const vendorId = String(row.VendorID || "").trim(); const vendor = vendorLookup[vendorId] || {}; return { ExpenseID: row.ExpenseID, ExpenseDate: normalizeDateOutput_(row.ExpenseDate), VendorID: row.VendorID, VendorName: vendor.VendorName || "", TotalAmount: row.TotalAmount, PaymentAccountID: row.PaymentAccountID, Description: row.Description, CreatedDate: normalizeDateOutput_(row.CreatedDate), CreatedBy: row.CreatedBy, ProjectID: row.ProjectID, InitialAllocationAmount: row.InitialAllocationAmount, expenseId: row.ExpenseID, expenseDate: normalizeDateOutput_(row.ExpenseDate), vendorId: row.VendorID, vendorName: vendor.VendorName || "", totalAmount: row.TotalAmount, paymentAccountId: row.PaymentAccountID, description: row.Description, createdDate: normalizeDateOutput_(row.CreatedDate), createdBy: row.CreatedBy, projectId: row.ProjectID, initialAllocationAmount: row.InitialAllocationAmount }; }); } function getPortalRefunds_(ss, projectId, vendorLookup) { const sheet = getRequiredSheet_(ss, "Refunds"); const rows = getSheetObjects_(sheet); assertRequiredColumns_( rows.headers, [ "RefundID", "RefundDate", "ExpenseID", "ProjectID", "PaymentAccountID", "VendorID", "RefundAmount", "RefundReason", "Notes", "CreatedDate", "CreatedBy" ], "refund" ); return rows.items .filter(function(row) { return String(row.ProjectID || "").trim() === String(projectId || "").trim(); }) .map(function(row) { const vendorId = String(row.VendorID || "").trim(); const vendor = vendorLookup[vendorId] || {}; return { RefundID: row.RefundID, RefundDate: normalizeDateOutput_(row.RefundDate), ExpenseID: row.ExpenseID, ProjectID: row.ProjectID, PaymentAccountID: row.PaymentAccountID, VendorID: row.VendorID, VendorName: vendor.VendorName || "", RefundAmount: row.RefundAmount, RefundReason: row.RefundReason, CreatedDate: normalizeDateOutput_(row.CreatedDate), CreatedBy: row.CreatedBy, refundId: row.RefundID, refundDate: normalizeDateOutput_(row.RefundDate), expenseId: row.ExpenseID, projectId: row.ProjectID, paymentAccountId: row.PaymentAccountID, vendorId: row.VendorID, vendorName: vendor.VendorName || "", refundAmount: row.RefundAmount, refundReason: row.RefundReason, createdDate: normalizeDateOutput_(row.CreatedDate), createdBy: row.CreatedBy }; }); } function getPortalPayments_(ss, projectId) { const sheet = getRequiredSheet_(ss, "Payments"); const rows = getSheetObjects_(sheet); assertRequiredColumns_( rows.headers, [ "PaymentID", "PaymentDate", "ProjectID", "PaymentAmount", "PaymentMethod", "PaymentReference", "Notes", "CreatedDateTime", "CreatedBy" ], "payment" ); return rows.items .filter(function(row) { return String(row.ProjectID || "").trim() === String(projectId || "").trim(); }) .map(function(row) { return { PaymentID: row.PaymentID, PaymentDate: normalizeDateOutput_(row.PaymentDate), ProjectID: row.ProjectID, PaymentAmount: row.PaymentAmount, PaymentMethod: row.PaymentMethod, PaymentReference: row.PaymentReference, Notes: row.Notes, CreatedDateTime: normalizeDateOutput_(row.CreatedDateTime), CreatedBy: row.CreatedBy, paymentId: row.PaymentID, paymentDate: normalizeDateOutput_(row.PaymentDate), projectId: row.ProjectID, paymentAmount: row.PaymentAmount, paymentMethod: row.PaymentMethod, paymentReference: row.PaymentReference, notes: row.Notes, createdDateTime: normalizeDateOutput_(row.CreatedDateTime), createdBy: row.CreatedBy }; }) .sort(function(a, b) { const aTime = toDate_(a.paymentDate); const bTime = toDate_(b.paymentDate); const aValue = aTime ? aTime.getTime() : 0; const bValue = bTime ? bTime.getTime() : 0; return bValue - aValue; }); } function getPortalExpenseAllocations_(ss, projectId) { const sheet = getRequiredSheet_(ss, "ExpenseAllocations"); const rows = getSheetObjects_(sheet); assertRequiredColumns_( rows.headers, [ "ExpenseAllocationID", "ExpenseID", "ProjectID", "AllocatedAmount", "Description", "Notes", "CreatedDate", "CreatedBy" ], "expense allocation" ); return rows.items .filter(function(row) { return String(row.ProjectID || "").trim() === String(projectId || "").trim(); }) .map(function(row) { return { ExpenseAllocationID: row.ExpenseAllocationID, ExpenseID: row.ExpenseID, ProjectID: row.ProjectID, AllocatedAmount: row.AllocatedAmount, Description: row.Description, CreatedDate: normalizeDateOutput_(row.CreatedDate), CreatedBy: row.CreatedBy, expenseAllocationId: row.ExpenseAllocationID, expenseId: row.ExpenseID, projectId: row.ProjectID, allocatedAmount: row.AllocatedAmount, description: row.Description, createdDate: normalizeDateOutput_(row.CreatedDate), createdBy: row.CreatedBy }; }); } function getPortalServiceRequests_(ss, projectId) { const sheet = getRequiredSheet_(ss, "ServiceRequests"); const rows = getSheetObjects_(sheet); assertRequiredColumns_( rows.headers, [ "RequestID", "CreatedDateTime", "CreatedBy", "Source", "Status", "PortalVisible", "PayingClientID", "PropertyClientID", "ProjectID", "RelatedProjectID", "RequesterName", "RequesterEmail", "RequesterPhone", "TextOK", "RequesterRelationship", "RequesterAddress", "RequesterStreet1", "RequesterStreet2", "RequesterCity", "RequesterState", "RequesterZip", "ServiceType", "IssueDescription", "Urgency", "ServiceAddress", "ServiceStreet1", "ServiceStreet2", "ServiceCity", "ServiceState", "ServiceZip", "PropertyOccupied", "PermissionToEnter", "OnSiteContactName", "OnSiteContactPhone", "BestContactTime", "BillingAddress", "BillingStreet1", "BillingStreet2", "BillingCity", "BillingState", "BillingZip", "Notes", "ReviewProjectName", "ReviewedBy", "ReviewedDateTime", "SRConverted" ], "service request" ); return rows.items .filter(function(row) { return (String(row.ProjectID || "").trim() === String(projectId || "").trim() || String(row.RelatedProjectID || "").trim() === String(projectId || "").trim()) && toBoolean_(row.PortalVisible); }) .map(function(row) { return { RequestID: row.RequestID, CreatedDateTime: normalizeDateOutput_(row.CreatedDateTime), CreatedBy: row.CreatedBy, Source: row.Source, Status: row.Status, PortalVisible: row.PortalVisible, PayingClientID: row.PayingClientID, PropertyClientID: row.PropertyClientID, ProjectID: row.ProjectID, RelatedProjectID: row.RelatedProjectID, RequesterName: row.RequesterName, RequesterEmail: row.RequesterEmail, RequesterPhone: row.RequesterPhone, TextOK: row.TextOK, RequesterRelationship: row.RequesterRelationship, RequesterAddress: row.RequesterAddress, RequesterStreet1: row.RequesterStreet1, RequesterStreet2: row.RequesterStreet2, RequesterCity: row.RequesterCity, RequesterState: row.RequesterState, RequesterZip: row.RequesterZip, ServiceType: row.ServiceType, IssueDescription: row.IssueDescription, Urgency: row.Urgency, ServiceAddress: row.ServiceAddress, ServiceStreet1: row.ServiceStreet1, ServiceStreet2: row.ServiceStreet2, ServiceCity: row.ServiceCity, ServiceState: row.ServiceState, ServiceZip: row.ServiceZip, PropertyOccupied: row.PropertyOccupied, PermissionToEnter: row.PermissionToEnter, OnSiteContactName: row.OnSiteContactName, OnSiteContactPhone: row.OnSiteContactPhone, BestContactTime: row.BestContactTime, BillingAddress: row.BillingAddress, BillingStreet1: row.BillingStreet1, BillingStreet2: row.BillingStreet2, BillingCity: row.BillingCity, BillingState: row.BillingState, BillingZip: row.BillingZip, ReviewProjectName: row.ReviewProjectName, ReviewedBy: row.ReviewedBy, ReviewedDateTime: normalizeDateOutput_(row.ReviewedDateTime), SRConverted: row.SRConverted, requestId: row.RequestID, createdDateTime: normalizeDateOutput_(row.CreatedDateTime), createdBy: row.CreatedBy, source: row.Source, status: row.Status, portalVisible: row.PortalVisible, payingClientId: row.PayingClientID, propertyClientId: row.PropertyClientID, projectId: row.ProjectID, relatedProjectId: row.RelatedProjectID, requesterName: row.RequesterName, requesterEmail: row.RequesterEmail, requesterPhone: row.RequesterPhone, textOk: row.TextOK, requesterRelationship: row.RequesterRelationship, requesterAddress: row.RequesterAddress, requesterStreet1: row.RequesterStreet1, requesterStreet2: row.RequesterStreet2, requesterCity: row.RequesterCity, requesterState: row.RequesterState, requesterZip: row.RequesterZip, serviceType: row.ServiceType, issueDescription: row.IssueDescription, urgency: row.Urgency, serviceAddress: row.ServiceAddress, serviceStreet1: row.ServiceStreet1, serviceStreet2: row.ServiceStreet2, serviceCity: row.ServiceCity, serviceState: row.ServiceState, serviceZip: row.ServiceZip, propertyOccupied: row.PropertyOccupied, permissionToEnter: row.PermissionToEnter, onSiteContactName: row.OnSiteContactName, onSiteContactPhone: row.OnSiteContactPhone, bestContactTime: row.BestContactTime, billingAddress: row.BillingAddress, billingStreet1: row.BillingStreet1, billingStreet2: row.BillingStreet2, billingCity: row.BillingCity, billingState: row.BillingState, billingZip: row.BillingZip, reviewProjectName: row.ReviewProjectName, reviewedBy: row.ReviewedBy, reviewedDateTime: normalizeDateOutput_(row.ReviewedDateTime), srConverted: row.SRConverted }; }); } function openPortalSpreadsheet_() { return SpreadsheetApp.openById(CONFIG.portalSpreadsheetId); } function getRequiredSheet_(spreadsheet, sheetName) { const sheet = spreadsheet.getSheetByName(sheetName); if (!sheet) { throw new Error('Sheet "' + sheetName + '" not found.'); } return sheet; } function getSheetObjects_(sheet) { const values = sheet.getDataRange().getValues(); if (values.length < 1) { return { headers: [], items: [] }; } const headers = values[0].map(function(header) { return String(header || "").trim(); }); const items = values.slice(1).map(function(row) { const item = {}; headers.forEach(function(header, index) { item[header] = row[index]; }); return item; }); return { headers: headers, items: items }; } function assertRequiredColumns_(headers, requiredColumns, label) { requiredColumns.forEach(function(name) { if (headers.indexOf(name) === -1) { throw new Error("Required " + label + " column missing: " + name); } }); } function columnNumber_(headers, columnName) { const index = headers.indexOf(columnName); if (index === -1) { throw new Error("Column not found: " + columnName); } return index + 1; } function buildPortalUrl_(token) { return "/portal/?t=" + encodeURIComponent(String(token || "").trim()); } function toAbsolutePortalUrl_(relativeUrl) { return "https://ketter.us" + String(relativeUrl || "").trim(); } function buildClientAddress_(clientRow) { const line1 = [ String(clientRow.Street1 || "").trim(), String(clientRow.Street2 || "").trim() ].filter(Boolean).join(", "); const cityStateZip = [ String(clientRow.City || "").trim(), String(clientRow.State || "").trim(), String(clientRow.Zip || "").trim() ].filter(Boolean).join(" "); return [line1, cityStateZip].filter(Boolean).join(", "); } function uniqueValues_(values) { const seen = {}; const output = []; values.forEach(function(value) { const key = String(value || "").trim(); if (!key) return; if (seen[key]) return; seen[key] = true; output.push(key); }); return output; } function jsonResponse_(obj) { return ContentService .createTextOutput(JSON.stringify(obj)) .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON); } function param_(e, name) { return String((e && e.parameter && e.parameter[name]) || "").trim(); } function digitsOnly_(value) { return String(value || "").replace(/\D/g, ""); } function toBoolean_(value) { if (value === true) return true; if (value === false) return false; const text = String(value || "").trim().toUpperCase(); return text === "TRUE" || text === "YES" || text === "Y" || text === "1"; } function isExpired_(value) { if (!value) return false; const dateValue = toDate_(value); if (!dateValue) return false; return dateValue.getTime() < new Date().getTime(); } function toDate_(value) { if (!value) return null; if (Object.prototype.toString.call(value) === "[object Date]" && !isNaN(value)) return value; const parsed = new Date(value); return isNaN(parsed) ? null : parsed; } function normalizeDateOutput_(value) { const dateValue = toDate_(value); return dateValue ? dateValue.toISOString() : ""; } function setCellValueIfChanged_(sheet, rowNumber, columnNumber, newValue) { const range = sheet.getRange(rowNumber, columnNumber); const oldValue = range.getValue(); const oldComparable = oldValue instanceof Date ? oldValue.getTime() : String(oldValue); const newComparable = newValue instanceof Date ? newValue.getTime() : String(newValue); if (oldComparable !== newComparable) { range.setValue(newValue); } } function getPortalConfig_() { const props = PropertiesService.getScriptProperties(); const portalSpreadsheetId = String(props.getProperty("PORTAL_SPREADSHEET_ID") || "").trim(); const tokenLifetimeRaw = String(props.getProperty("PORTAL_TOKEN_LIFETIME_HOURS") || "24").trim(); const portalProjectsPastDaysRaw = String(props.getProperty("PORTAL_PROJECTS_PAST_DAYS") || "").trim(); const portalProjectsFutureDaysRaw = String(props.getProperty("PORTAL_PROJECTS_FUTURE_DAYS") || "").trim(); const portalTokenLifetimeHours = Number(tokenLifetimeRaw); const portalProjectsPastDays = portalProjectsPastDaysRaw === "" ? 3650 : Number(portalProjectsPastDaysRaw); const portalProjectsFutureDays = portalProjectsFutureDaysRaw === "" ? 3650 : Number(portalProjectsFutureDaysRaw); if (!portalSpreadsheetId) { throw new Error("Missing script property: PORTAL_SPREADSHEET_ID"); } if (isNaN(portalTokenLifetimeHours) || portalTokenLifetimeHours <= 0) { throw new Error("Invalid script property: PORTAL_TOKEN_LIFETIME_HOURS"); } if (isNaN(portalProjectsPastDays) || portalProjectsPastDays < 0) { throw new Error("Invalid script property: PORTAL_PROJECTS_PAST_DAYS"); } if (isNaN(portalProjectsFutureDays) || portalProjectsFutureDays < 0) { throw new Error("Invalid script property: PORTAL_PROJECTS_FUTURE_DAYS"); } return { portalSpreadsheetId: portalSpreadsheetId, portalTokenLifetimeHours: portalTokenLifetimeHours, portalProjectsPastDays: portalProjectsPastDays, portalProjectsFutureDays: portalProjectsFutureDays }; }
